title: trisetum velutinum subsp. cavanillesianum
intro: Trisetum velutinum subsp. cavanillesianum is a plant species, also known as velvet oat grass, a subspecies of the Trisetum velutinum plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Trisetum velutinum subsp. cavanillesianum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potential applications in treating respiratory issues. Trisetum velutinum subsp. cavanillesianum can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture or essential oil form for its medicinal benefits.
